resources.string: Enable a search integration to use research
Confirm your date of birth to continue
Create apps, prototypes, and interactive documents that use Claude inside the artifact
Enable artifacts to use AI-powered artifacts
This alarm was set on your device.
This analysis tool result is not supported on your device yet.
An error occurred while loading this artifact.
Anyone in your organization with the link can view this artifact and its files.
Publishing will make this artifact accessible to anyone and potentially visible in search engine results. Your chat will remain private.
This artifact is accessible to anyone and potentially visible in search engine results. Your chat remains private.
Artifacts are user-generated and may contain unverified or potentially unsafe content.
Generate content like code snippets, text documents, or website designs in a dedicated window
Artifacts you\'ve had with Claude will show up here.
Enable artifacts to use this tool
Please enable the microphone permission to use speech input.
Please enable the microphone permission to use voice mode.

This subscription cannot be cancelled or changed within this app because it was purchased on another platform. \n\nTo manage your subscription, please do so on the platform where you purchased the subscription.
Your subscription was purchased on the web. Tap below to manage it on claude.ai.
Are you sure you want to log out?
Once you\'re done, come back to continue
Claude will search your calendar for events and appointments.
Choose which calendars Claude can access
This file is too large to preview

Auto mode lets Claude handle permission prompts automatically. Claude checks each tool call for risky actions and prompt injection before executing, runs the ones it assesses as lower-risk, and blocks the rest.
Auto mode is now Claude Code\'s default permission mode

Auto mode lets Claude handle permission decisions during coding sessions, so developers can run longer tasks without being interrupted by Claude asking for manual approvals. Auto mode also includes additional safeguards against prompt injections.
Proactively fix CI failures and review comments. Claude may post comments on your behalf.
Could not update auto-fix setting. You can try again.
Could not update auto-merge setting. You can try again.
Running in the shared directory %1$s. Other sessions may conflict — consider worktree mode to isolate changes.
Session started in a new worktree at %1$s.
Connect your GitHub account to select a repository and branch for your session.
Need a different configuration? Create a new environment with custom settings.
Couldn\'t open that environment. Make sure you\'re signed in to the same account.
This branch hasn\'t diverged from main. Changes will appear here after Claude makes edits.
Repo missing? Install the Claude GitHub app in a private repository to access it here.
The Claude GitHub app must be installed on your repository to use Claude Code. Install it to enable Claude to create branches and open pull requests.
Picking up where you left off…
Pick up where you left off
Kick off a task, big or small
Describe what you want to build…
Couldn\'t stop the session. Try again.
Suggested next prompt: %1$s. Double tap to fill.
Tell Claude what to do instead
Get notified when Claude finishes working on your code. You can change this later in settings.
Cloud environments power Claude\'s code execution. You can always create or edit environments later.
Unrestricted internet access for maximum flexibility. Use caution with untrusted sources.
Blocks internet access for maximum security with reduced functionality.
Downloads packages from verified sources, balancing security and performance.
Shared session. Visible to anyone in %1$s with the link.
Shared session. Visible to anyone in %1$s with repo access and the link.
Shared session. Visible to anyone with the link.
Shared session. Visible to anyone with repo access and the link.
Not available for the selected model
Create a plan before making changes
%1$s has specific safety measures that flag messages with biology topics. Switched to %2$s.
%1$s has specific safety measures that flag messages with cybersecurity topics. Switched to %2$s.
%1$s has specific safety measures that flagged something in this message. Switched to %2$s.
%1$s’s safety measures flagged this message for sensitive biology topics. To continue, switch to a different model or continue by editing your prompt on web or desktop.
%1$s’s safety measures flagged this message for sensitive cybersecurity topics. To continue, switch to a different model or continue by editing your prompt on web or desktop.
%1$s’s safety measures flagged this message for sensitive topics. To continue, switch to a different model or continue by editing your prompt on web or desktop.
Remote control is offline. Run claude remote-control to reconnect, then try again.
Remote control session is offline. Reconnect or run /remote-control to start a new session.
Enter a new name for this session
Choose an environment for your Claude Code session
Choose a repository for your Claude Code session
Couldn\'t load more sessions. Tap to retry
Showcase your work and how you code with Claude
Unable to verify your organization\'s sharing settings. Try again later.
Your organization has disabled session sharing.
You don\'t have permission to change sharing for this session.
Verify your identity to share this session.
Session sharing isn\'t available for organizations with Zero Data Retention.
Anyone in %1$s with access to this repository can view
Only the session owner can change who has access.
Anyone with the link can view
Anyone with access to this repository can view
Anyone on your team with the link can view
Anyone in %1$s with the link can view
This session is from a private repository and may include secure credentials. Anyone with the link could view them.
This session is from a private repository. Sharing may expose code to anyone with the link.
This session may include secure credentials.
Content is unverified and doesn\'t represent Anthropic. Be cautious running code from sources you don\'t trust.
Open this conversation in the Claude desktop app to set up computer use.
Detailed per-phase view is coming soon.
This workflow is no longer available.
Claude is AI and can make mistakes.
This request appears to violate our Usage Policy
Submitting this report will send the entire current conversation to Anthropic for future improvements to our models. Learn More
What was unsatisfying about this response?
What was satisfying about this response?
Why do you think this was incorrectly flagged?
Did not fully follow my request
Editing this message will restart the conversation from this point.
You’re offline. The rest of Claude’s reply will appear when you reconnect.
Claude is responding in the background. Once it’s complete, you’ll see it here.
Taking longer than usual. Trying again shortly…
You’re offline. Your message will send when you reconnect.
How can I help you this afternoon?
How can I help you this evening?
How can I help you this late night?
How can I help you this morning?
You can add at most %1$d attachments to a message.
Use caution before sending. Malicious content could trick Claude into harmful actions or sharing your data.
Some conversations could not be deleted
Are you sure? These conversations will be gone forever.
Failed to load chats. Tap to retry
Are you sure? This conversation will be gone forever.
Our team will review this content and take action if necessary.
You\'ve reached your daily voice limit. Try again tomorrow.
No files in this conversation yet
Attachment limit reached for this chat.
This conversation has reached its length limit.
Claude reached its max length for this message.
Claude reached its tool-use limit for this turn.
Our safety filters flagged this chat. If you think this is wrong, you can start a new chat or give our team feedback.
%1$s\'s safety filters flagged this chat. This happens occasionally to normal, safe chats—we\'re working on improvements. Continue with %2$s, or give feedback.
%1$s\'s safety filters flagged this chat. If you think this is wrong, you can start a new chat or give our team feedback.
Claude’s response could not be fully generated
File preview isn\'t available in shared chats
Only messages up to this point will be shared
Your remote and remote control sessions will show up here.
Get notified when Code sessions have updates
Threads started in this project will show up here
Get notified when Code sessions need your approval to use a tool
Or set up an environment for your own repo →
Describe what you\'d like Claude to build…
%1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Feel free to step away, Claude will notify you as soon as it responds.
Ask an organization owner to add this for your team
Claude will help you find available connectors in your directory. Change anytime in Settings.
You can turn it on anytime from Settings > Connectors.
Couldn’t save your choice. You can try again.
Claude will help you find available connectors in your directory.
Claude will help you find available connectors in your directory.
Your subscription was originally purchased on the App Store. To upgrade your plan, visit the App Store. To buy usage credits, visit claude.ai from your browser.
Continue on the App Store or web
Your subscription was originally purchased on Google Play. To upgrade your plan, visit Google Play. To buy usage credits, visit claude.ai from your browser.
Continue on Google Play or web
Your subscription was originally purchased on web. To upgrade your plan or buy usage credits, visit claude.ai from your browser.
Couldn\'t connect to this app screen. Tap Retry to try again.
No apps available. Install a plugin that provides one from System settings.
Conway wants to use %1$s. It will be able to read and act on your behalf there until you revoke access.
Couldn\'t enable ^1. Try again or check Settings → Connectors.
^1 connected — always allowed. Manage in Settings → Connectors
Connecting lets Claude use these tools without asking each time. You can change this in Settings.
Send a message to start chatting with Conway.
Still trying to reconnect — your message will be sent automatically when the connection returns
Session taken over by another client on this device
\"%1$s\" will be removed from your container.
No plugins installed. Tap Install to add a .cnw.zip bundle.
A plugin with this name is already installed. Replace it with \"%1$s\"?
\"%1$s\" can run code inside your Conway container. Only install plugins you trust.
\"%1$s\" will stop firing and be permanently removed.
Ask Conway in chat to set up a schedule.
Not connected to your Conway container yet
That message is hidden by the tool-calls filter
That message isn\'t in the loaded history yet
Clients connected to this container and the tools they provide.
Runtime that hosts your Conway session.
Your files and conversation are preserved.
Diagnostic options for inspecting how Claude works behind the scenes.
Show tool calls and thinking blocks in the chat.
Install custom tools, UI tabs, and context handlers.
The Claude model family this Conway session uses to respond.
Recurring reminders that wake Conway on a cron or interval.
Public URLs that wake Conway when external services call them.
Conway wants to read your calendar
Conway wants to add a calendar event
Conway wants to use your location
Your device may ask for permission again. You can change this anytime in Settings.
Conway wants to create a webhook. External services can POST to the resulting URL to trigger the agent.
External services pointing at this URL will stop reaching Conway. \"%1$s\" will be permanently removed.
Webhooks are created by Conway when you ask it to connect to an external service.
Lock %1$s to a trusted sender. Conway will reject any request that isn\'t verified by the source you pick.
Copy this secret now — you won\'t be able to see it again after closing.
This webhook is already verified. Close and refresh to see its current state.
Couldn\'t generate secret. You can try again.
Conway will reject requests without a valid X-Hub-Signature-256 header. Paste the secret into your repository\'s webhook settings.
Conway will reject requests without a matching %1$s header. Works with Zapier, Make, n8n, or anything that lets you set a custom request header.
If you lose this secret, delete the webhook and create a new one.
What can Claude tackle for you today?
Runs from your scheduled tasks will show up here
Check in from your phone, browser, or Claude desktop app.
Start and steer tasks directly from your phone.
Work continues in the background, even when you close the app.
Keep Cowork going when you\'re on the go
To delete your account, please contact support.
Are you sure you want to delete your account?
Deleting your account is permanent. You will have no way of recovering your account or conversation data.
Are you sure? This will be gone forever.
By continuing, you agree to Anthropic’s Consumer Terms and Usage Policy, and acknowledge their Privacy Policy.
By continuing, you agree to Anthropic’s Consumer Terms and Usage Policy, and acknowledge their Privacy Policy.
This will remove access to all tools and resources from this connector.
Get notified when Claude messages you in Dispatch
Some of your selection is not supported.
Claude\'s election info may be outdated. To get reliable, up-to-date voting information, visit ^1.
Chats you’ve starred will show up here.
Chats you’ve had with Claude will show up here.
Create a project to organize and customize chats with Claude around a topic or set of documents.

Your account has been disabled after an automatic review of your recent activities. Please take a look at our Terms of Service and Acceptable Use Policy for more information. If you wish to appeal your suspension, please visit our Trust & Safety Center.
Your session has expired. Please try logging in again.
Attachment limit reached for this chat. Start a new chat to add more.
Claude is still finishing a previous response in this chat. Try again in a moment.
This email is already associated with another account or was used too recently.
Login with email has been disabled for this account. Please choose another login method.
That code is invalid or expired
Invalid email address. Please double-check the email entered and try again.
We were unable to validate your device. Please try again.
Some conversation history couldn\'t be loaded
This link has already been used
Please upgrade to the latest version of the Claude app
You do not have a console account.
The server is overloaded. Please try again later.
Unable to send verification code to this number. Try a different number or try again later.
We’re performing maintenance to keep things running smoothly — Claude will be back in a bit.
Your subscription was purchased for another account.
You’ve reached the limit for Claude messages at this time. Please wait before trying again.
Message limit reached for current model. Please try again later or switch models.
There was an error logging in. If you believe you received this message in error, please contact support.
An unexpected server error has occurred. Please try again.
Logging in is currently disabled. Please check back later.
Unfortunately, Claude is not available to new users right now. We’re working hard to expand our availability soon.
Unfortunately, Claude is only available in certain regions right now. We’re working hard to expand to other regions soon.\nGet notified when Claude is available in your region.
An error has occurred. Please try again.
Learn more about how Anthropic uses Feedback
You can attach up to %1$d photos
1. Describe the issue\n2. Steps to reproduce\n3. Expected vs. actual behavior
Suggest a new feature or improvement…
Share your thoughts about the app…
Let us know what’s on your mind…
Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
I just need you to add some missing information, then we can continue the chat.
Your credentials are never saved in Claude
Something went wrong. Please try again.
The Internet connection appears to be offline.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please upgrade to the latest version of the app.
Incognito chats aren\'t saved or added to memory.
They\'re also not used for model training.
Incognito chats aren\'t saved or added to memory.
Chat history is still visible to your admin.
Incognito chats aren\'t saved or used to train models.
Incognito chats can\'t access memory. They aren\'t saved to history, added to memory, or used to train models.\n\nLearn more about how your data is used.
Incognito chats aren\'t saved or used to train models.\n\nLearn more about how your data is used.
Incognito chats can\'t access memory. They aren\'t saved to history or added to memory.\n\nNote: Chat history is still visible to your admin. Learn more about how your data is used.
Send a friend a free week of Pro. If they love it and subscribe, you\'ll get %1$s in usage credits.
Send a friend a free week of Pro.
Couldn\'t load your pass details. Check your connection and try again.
Guest passes aren\'t available on your plan right now.
Failed to discover health data types
Query health and fitness data with aggregations and filtering
Something went wrong processing an attachment.
Allow Claude to generate interactive visualizations, charts, and diagrams directly in the conversation.
Value will be read from server on login
Your subscription will activate once your identity is verified.
Claude will use your location info to provide context-aware responses.
Check your email to finish signing in
Enter the code we sent to your email
Email login is not allowed on this device. Please sign in with your organization\'s SSO.
No supported browser found for SSO login. Please install the latest version of Chrome and make sure your Android OS is update to date.
Invalid SSO response. Please try again later, or update to the latest version of the app if the problem persists.
Please enter a valid email address
Your session has expired.\nPlease log in again.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Allow users to sign in with email magic link
Allow users to sign in with Google
Failed to open location. Make sure you have a maps app or browser installed and try again.
Get notified about new features, tips, and occasional promotions
Failed to load the MCP app
No prompts or resources provided for this MCP server
No tools provided for this MCP server
View and edit your memory files on the web.
Claude will no longer have access to the memories in this file. This can\'t be undone.
No memory files yet. Claude will create them as you chat.
View and manage what Claude remembers.
Claude keeps its existing memory but won\'t use memory or make new memories.
This will permanently delete all memories, including project memories. This can\'t be undone.
Allow Claude to search for relevant details in past chats. Learn more.
Allow Claude to remember relevant context from your chats. This setting controls memory for both chats and projects. Learn more.
After more chats you\'ll see what Claude remembers about you here
When safety measures flag a message, automatically switch to a different model to keep chatting. When off, your chat will pause instead.
Switch models when a message is flagged
Select a project to move these chats into.
Some chats could not be moved
Notifying you when Claude has finished a task
Notifying you when Claude has finished working on your code
Notifying you when Claude finished responding in the background
Get notified when Claude messages you in Conway
Get notified when Claude messages you in Dispatch
Get notified about new features, tips, and occasional promotions
Notifying you when Claude has finished researching
Notifications let voice mode stay active when your screen is off, like when using a Bluetooth headset.
This helps us verify your account
My downloads folder is a mess! Can you clean it up?
Turn these receipts in this folder into an expense report
Create a shopping list, go on Chrome, and make an order
Start tasks from your phone for Claude to run on your desktop. Get the desktop app to try it.
Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Anthropic AI models. Change anytime in privacy settings. Learn more
Claude will use this to refer to you
Let Claude see your events to help plan your day
Let Claude use your location for nearby suggestions
Get alerts when Claude finishes a long task or replies
Claude works best with access to the following permissions
Enter your phone number to get a verification code
Limits apply for the Free plan
Max isn’t available yet in your region
I agree to Anthropic’s Consumer Terms and Acceptable Use Policy and confirm that I am at least 18 years of age.
I agree to Anthropic’s Consumer Terms and Acceptable Use Policy.
I consent to collection and use of my personal information in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
A few things to review before getting started
Something went wrong showing this PDF
Claude can create and manage events in your calendar app.
To allow access to your calendar, turn on the permission in your system settings.
To allow access to your health data, turn on the permission in your system settings.
Claude can read health data from health connect
To allow access to your health data, turn on the permission in your system settings.
Claude can access your location for local recommendations and context. Your location data is never shared.
To allow access to your location, turn on the permission in your system settings.
Live monitoring is unavailable for this call. The transcript will appear here once the call ends.
This call has ended. The full transcript will appear here shortly.
The call transcript couldn\'t be read in the expected format.
Anthropic believes in transparent data practices
Keeping your data safe is a priority. Learn how your information is protected when using Anthropic products, and visit our Privacy Center and Privacy Policy for more details.
What personal preferences should Claude consider in responses?
Your preferences will apply to all conversations.
Conversation preferences are disabled by your organization.
Ask clarifying questions before giving detailed answers
What are you trying to achieve?
Describe your project, goals, subject, etc…
Only invited members can view and use this project
Everyone in your organization can view and use this project
Public projects are disabled by your organization
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Instruct Claude how to behave and respond for all of the chats within %s
Instruct Claude with prompts like: Use a professional tone, Use concise and simple wording, You are an expert in Astrophysics, etc.
Project memory will appear after a few chats.
Project is Open. Everything added to project knowledge will be viewable by your org.
Upload files or create new text content
Add relevant documents, text, code, or other files here so Claude can use them as context for all your chats within %1$s.
Add relevant documents, text, code, or other files here so Claude can use them as context for all your chats within this project.
To save space in chats, Claude will look up specific information as needed.
Set up Claude for your classes, career, and research
You’re out of messages until %1$s at %2$s
Try again later or switch models
You’re about to load an image from %1$s. Is that okay?
We\'ve made some improvements that require the latest version.
This can’t be undone. If you want to research this topic again, you can ask in this chat or start a new session.
We’ll send you a notification when complete.
Screenshot captured. Want to share feedback?
Support provided by ^1, not Claude. Learn more
If you or someone you know is having a difficult time, free support is available.
Hold to speak, release to send
Upgrade for more usage and capabilities.
When on, you will sometimes be asked if you’d like to share the recording to help evaluate and improve Claude.
For approved sessions, share voice chat audio and transcripts
Anyone in your org with the link
You haven\'t shared a link yet.\nOnce you share a chat, they\'ll appear here.
Are you sure you want to unshare \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Choose a language to speak in
Send messages to Claude using your voice.
Sorry, the selected speech input language is no longer available. Please update it in the settings.
Sorry, we didn’t catch that. Please make sure your microphone is working.
Sorry, we didn’t catch that. Please check your internet connection and try again.
That’s it for now. Please continue the conversation in a new session.
Sorry, we didn’t catch that. There was a bad response from the server.
Sorry, we didn’t catch that. Please try again.
Ask an organization owner to add this for your team
Your Google Play account does not meet the minimum age requirement to use Claude. Learn more
This will permanently delete the task and its progress. This can’t be undone.
A few things to know before we get started:
You can upload more materials later
New chats in this project will automatically reference uploaded material
This timer was set on your device.
Claude cannot guarantee the security or privacy practices of third-party connectors.
Review each action carefully before approving.
Claude would like to use an external connector
This content is not viewable on your device.
You can edit permissions anytime in settings.
Can’t be changed for this chat
Your session timed out. Sign in again to verify your identity.
To control your computer from this device, sign in again to verify your identity.
Remove a device from your trusted devices settings, then try again.
Confirm to keep using your remote sessions
Choose the plan right for you
You\'ve reached the project limit for Free. Upgrade to Pro or Max to make projects.

You have an active Google Play Store subscription, but it was not purchased for the current account you\'re signed into. \n\nPlease sign in with the account you made the purchase with to manage your subscription.
There was a problem connecting to the Google Play Store. Please try again later.
The subscription purchase is pending. Your Pro upgrade should take effect as soon as the purchase is finalized.
Your subscription should be activated soon. If it does not take effect within the next hour, please contact support.
Enjoying Claude? Get even more with Pro
Something went wrong loading usage data.
Starts when you send a message
You cannot create an account because you do not meet the minimum age requirement.
I agree to Anthropic’s Terms of Service and Usage Policy.
You must enter your birthday to continue.
I confirm that I am at least 18 years of age
Enter the temporary code sent via text to\n
Not seeing the code? <u>Try sending again</u>
You must have a valid phone number to use Anthropic’s services. SMS and data charges may apply.
Please enter a valid phone number.
You must agree to the privacy policy to create an account.
You must agree to the terms to create an account.
Audio and transcripts from voice mode help Anthropic improve how Claude converses. Turn this off or delete recordings anytime in settings.
Share voice data to improve voice mode
Your device can\'t play audio right now. Exit voice mode and try again.
Exit voice mode and try again later
What was unsatisfying about your experience?
Talked over me while I was speaking
Claude is set to %1$s right now.
Claude is still learning %1$s. Claude is set to %2$s right now.
Paused while another app is using audio.
The microphone button will open Claude and automatically start dictation.
Alerts when Claude needs your approval to use a tool during voice mode
Review each action carefully before approving.
Claude wants to use a tool that requires your approval
Claude will automatically search the web when it determines it needs current information
Allow Claude to execute code and create and edit docs, spreadsheets, presentations, PDFs, and data reports.
No app found to open this file type
